name: Oven-Baked Buttermilk Chicken
recipeIngredient: 3 lbs Chicken Cut into Serving Pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Substitution: Blend 1 1/2 teaspoons lemon juice with enough milk to equal 1/2 cup; let stand 5 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 425 degrees F.
3. Combine the golden onion soup mix with flour; set aside.
4. Beat eggs with buttermilk. Dip chicken pieces in buttermilk mixture, then coat well with the flour mixture. Place in a large shallow baking pan on a rack, and chill for 30 minutes.
5. Drizzle with butter, then bake for 45 minutes or until well done.
Note: This is a great recipe for picnics or eating outdoors.
